function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "dispatch_guard", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": 0.2, "adjustment_reasons": ["Panic button from a guard is inherently serious — guard signaling active distress", "n=0 prior is a hand-set assumption with no observational backing, warranting modest adjustment", "No precedents exist at this site — novelty increases caution but the event type itself is high-severity"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.88, "what_would_change_my_mind": "A guard radio check confirming the panic button was accidental/dropped device would change this to investigate. Direct visual confirmation of all-clear would downgrade to E0-E1."}
